name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes late payments. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: manual reconciliation of bank transactions and invoices
